resources.name: Login
resources.description: Run this first. jordan.reyes is Manager + Admin — full access. TableServe.Api has no JWT/token auth planned (the Authorization header is not required or checked) — this just confirms valid credentials and returns the full Staff object.

resources.name: Get All Staff
resources.description: Returns all staff members. Expect a 200 with an array. Run Login first.

resources.name: Get Staff by Id
resources.description: Returns a single staff member by ID. Try ID 1 for Jordan Reyes. Expect 404 for an ID that doesn't exist.

resources.name: Create Staff
resources.description: Creates a new staff member. Expect a 201 with the created staff member, including its new id.

resources.name: Update Staff
resources.description: Updates an existing staff member by ID. Try ID 1 for Jordan Reyes. Expect a 200 with the updated staff member.

resources.name: Delete Staff
resources.description: Deletes a staff member by ID. Expect a 204 with no response body.

resources.name: Get All Categories
resources.description: Returns all categories. Expect a 200 with an array. Run Login first.

resources.name: Get Category by Id
resources.description: Returns a single category by ID. Try ID 1 for Appetizers. Expect 404 for an ID that doesn't exist.

resources.name: Create Category
resources.description: Creates a new category. Expect a 201 with the created category, including its new id.

resources.name: Update Category
resources.description: Updates an existing category by ID. Try ID 1 for Appetizers. Expect a 200 with the updated category.

resources.name: Delete Category
resources.description: Deletes a category by ID. Expect a 204 with no response body.

resources.name: Get All Menu Items
resources.description: Returns all menu items. Expect a 200 with an array. Run Login first.

resources.name: Get Menu Item by Id
resources.description: Returns a single menu item by ID. Try ID 1 for Mozzarella Sticks. Expect 404 for an ID that doesn't exist.

resources.name: Create Menu Item
resources.description: Creates a new menu item. Expect a 201 with the created menu item, including its new id.

resources.name: Update Menu Item
resources.description: Updates an existing menu item by ID. Try ID 1 for Mozzarella Sticks. Expect a 200 with the updated menu item.

resources.name: Delete Menu Item
resources.description: Deletes a menu item by ID. Expect a 204 with no response body.

resources.name: Get All Orders
resources.description: Returns all orders. Expect a 200 with an array. Run Login first.

resources.name: Get Order by Id
resources.description: Returns a single order by ID. Try ID 1 for a Placed order. Expect 404 for an ID that doesn't exist.

resources.name: Create Order
resources.description: Creates a new order. Expect a 201 with the created order, including its new id.

resources.name: Update Order
resources.description: Updates an existing order by ID. Expect a 200 with the updated order.

resources.name: Delete Order
resources.description: Deletes an order by ID. Expect a 204 with no response body.

resources.name: Start Preparing
resources.description: Advances order status from PLACED to PREPARING. No body needed.

resources.name: Mark Ready
resources.description: Advances order status from PREPARING to READY. No body needed.

resources.name: Mark Served
resources.description: Advances order status from READY to SERVED. No body needed.

resources.name: Cancel Order
resources.description: Cancels an order. Body is a JSON-encoded string (not an object) — e.g. "reason text" including the quotes. ASP.NET Core's [FromBody] string binding requires Content-Type: application/json even though the payload is just a string; a text/plain body returns 415. Only valid when status is PLACED or PREPARING.

resources.name: Get All Order Items
resources.description: Returns all order items. Expect a 200 with an array. Run Login first.

resources.name: Get Order Item by Id
resources.description: Returns a single order item by ID. Try ID 1. Expect 404 for an ID that doesn't exist.

resources.name: Create Order Item
resources.description: Creates a new order item on an existing order. Expect a 201 with the created order item, including its new id.

resources.name: Update Order Item
resources.description: Updates an existing order item by ID. Expect a 200 with the updated order item.

resources.name: Delete Order Item
resources.description: Deletes an order item by ID. Expect a 204 with no response body.
